spec_match.rationale: Perfect spec compliance, combining text-decoration-skip-spaces with various decoration lines (underline, overline, line-through) and font scaling.

interactive.rationale: A brilliant interactive playground. It features skip-spaces buttons, line style selectors, font size controls, and a native resizable horizontal container that lets authors wrap lines dynamically.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly aligned with parent description: container is resizable, and a static side-by-side comparison grid is supplied as a baseline.

edge_cases.rationale: Successfully tests overlapping decorations and multi-line wrapping boundaries at customizable sizes.

references.rationale: Includes direct links to three companion concept pages to encourage broader learning.

design_system.rationale: Conforms fully to standard spacing, borders, typography, crumbs, and color variables.

openQuestions.title: Add direct specification link in the see also footer
openQuestions.detail: The footer includes helpful references to other local concept pages, but misses a direct external reference to the W3C CSS Text Decoration 4 spec or ChromeStatus. Let's add it to bring it in line with other concept files.

summary: An exceptional interactive demo that perfectly showcases CSS4 multiline wrapping behavior. By leveraging native CSS horizontal resizing on the container, it lets authors witness space skipping adjustments at arbitrary wrap points in real time. It is a highly compliant, masterfully designed reference page.
